data_in.description: TCN training dataset (spectra and formula annotations)
TCN test dataset (spectra and formula annotations)

data_out.description: Augmented rescore training set with capped positives, cross-spectrum negatives, and 1:1 ratio
Augmented rescore test set with capped positives, cross-spectrum negatives, and 1:1 ratio

domain_knowledge: Capping positives per formula prevents model overfitting to frequent molecular formulas in the training set.
Cross-spectrum negatives paired within a precursor m/z window simulate realistic misidentification scenarios in MS/MS spectra.
Downsampling to 1:1 positive:negative ratio mitigates bias towards the majority class in binary classification tasks.
The rescore model uses a Siamese architecture to compare query spectra against library candidates for formula ranking.
Precursor m/z window defines the chemical feasibility region for false-positive (incorrect formula) candidates during negative sampling.

direct_checks: file_exists: verify that prepare_augment_rescore.py exists in the repository github:JosieHong__FIDDLE
script_runs: execute prepare_augment_rescore.py with TCN train and test set inputs (concrete file paths from repository) and verify script completes without runtime errors
file_format_is: verify output files are in expected format (CSV or pickle, as indicated by script logic)
field_present: verify output training data contains columns/fields for: positive/negative labels, precursor m/z, formula, spectrum identifiers
value_in_range: verify positive:negative ratio in output training data is 1:1 (robust to rounding; allow 0.95–1.05 ratio)
value_in_range: verify capped positives per formula do not exceed --pos_cap parameter value specified in script invocation
contains_substring: verify cross-spectrum negatives are generated by checking that negative pairs have distinct spectrum identifiers but fall within --tolerance ppm of precursor m/z
row_count_equals: verify test split row count matches input test set (no augmentation applied to test); robust to any permutation of rows

output_matches_reference: if a reference augmented dataset is deposited (Zenodo or repository release), compare row counts, ratio statistics, and negative-pair m/z distances to reference output (parameter-sensitive to random seeds and pool worker ordering; no canonical answer without fixed seed specification)
expert_review: Assess whether the --pos_cap, --tolerance, and --num_workers parameter settings used are scientifically justified and appropriate for formula prediction rescoring
Evaluate whether the 1:1 positive:negative downsampling ratio is optimal for training a BCE-loss Siamese rescore head, or if alternative ratios should be tested
Assess whether the cross-spectrum negative generation strategy (m/z window within --tolerance ppm) introduces realistic or biologically plausible false-match scenarios
Review whether formula refinement parallelization via multiprocessing.Pool preserves the correctness of the refinement logic and does not introduce non-deterministic artifacts

inputs: TCN training dataset (spectra and formula annotations)
TCN test dataset (spectra and formula annotations)
methodology_summary: Load TCN train and test spectra with formula annotations.
Cap the number of positive examples per molecular formula to enforce balance.
Generate negative examples by pairing spectra within a precursor m/z window.
Downsample combined positive and negative examples to 1:1 ratio.
Validation: Output train and test sets conform to expected format and contain correct positive/negative counts and ratio.

task_description: Run prepare_augment_rescore.py on TCN train and test sets to generate augmented rescore training data with capped positives per formula, cross-spectrum negatives within precursor m/z window, and 1:1 positive:negative downsampling. Output augmented training and test sets ready for model training.
task_objective: Document the data preparation pipeline (positive capping, negative sampling, ratio balancing) executed by prepare_augment_rescore.py on TCN datasets for rescore model training.
title: Reconstruct the Siamese rescore data augmentation step via prepare_augment_rescore.py

Each TracedClaim's evidence_span has been substring-checked against its source section; see logs/llm_calls.jsonl and capsules/<task_id>/quality_report.json for groundedness results.
workflow_description: 1. Load TCN train and test set spectra and annotations. 2. Cap positive examples per molecular formula to enforce class balance constraints. 3. Generate cross-spectrum negatives by pairing spectra within a defined precursor m/z window. 4. Downsample the combined positive and negative examples to achieve 1:1 positive:negative ratio. 5. Write augmented train and test sets to output files in format compatible with rescore model ingestion.
